case_title: LA JEANA THOMPSON VS. MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) EDGAR PEREZ, REGIONAL DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORP
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, LA JEANA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF LA JEANA THOMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY EDGAR PEREZ, REGIONAL DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. PARTIES WENT OUTSIDE IN THE COURT HALLWAY AT 11:30 AM TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE. PARTIES CAME BACK IN COURT AT 11:40 AM AND STATED THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN IMPASSE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE-SHERIFF- OF $40 WAIVED) SERVED AUG-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORP
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY THOMPSON, LA JEANA MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORP
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, LA JEANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY THOMPSON, LA JEANA AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, LA JEANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORP $1,049.31 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,049.31, PLAINTIFF HAS SUPPORTED AND IS AWARDED $802.63 FOR UNRETURNED RENT FOR DECEMBER 1-11, 2021, AND $246.68 FOR RENTAL OF A U-HAUL, FOR A TOTAL OF $1,049.31. ALL OTHER CLAIM COMPONENTS ARE DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PENDING ADMINISTRATIVE CLAIMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
